Poojasri M | AI Engineer — LLMs, ML Systems & Automation

Poojasri M is an AI Engineer specializing in building intelligent systems, scalable ML systems, LLM-powered applications, and agentic workflows.

## Key Skills
- Large Language Models (LLMs) & RAG
- Agentic AI Workflows & Automation
- Machine Learning & Deep Learning
- Full-Stack AI Development
- ML Systems Architecture
